The '''FA-504s''' was a [[Transport/Legends|transport]] vessel produced by the [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corporation]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="Talnar" />

As a stand-alone design, the FA-504s was unable to compete with CEC's other transport models, such as the [[YT-series/Legends|YT-series]], and was seen to be a less-popular design. It measured twenty-eight meters in length and had the capacity to carry up to ten passengers and 100,000 metric tons of cargo.<ref name="Talnar" />

==Appearances==
